title: anthyllis expallens
intro: Anthyllis expallens, also known as kidney vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, characterized by its pink or purple flowers and creeping habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Anthyllis expallens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Anthyllis expallens can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support kidney health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
